name: lez_wallet_module
description: Shielded LEZ wallet and LEZ program interface. Wraps lez-wallet-core (Rust) via FFI. Required by LP-0008 agent_module for all wallet.* and program.* skills.
_build_note: Requires Nix + Qt6 + the compiled liblez_wallet_core from lez-wallet-core/target/release/. Set LEZ_WALLET_CORE_DIR=<path/to/lez-wallet-core/target/release> before nix develop / cmake. See BUILD.md.
